case_title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. JUSTIN T. SPILMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70279668) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SPILMAN, JUSTIN T. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPILMAN, JUSTIN T. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 455 FELL STREET #212, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70279668) (TRANSACTION ID # 70279668)
